Comfortable Living Space: Apartment Anita Cetinje in Cetinje offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room. The property features a terrace and free WiFi, ensuring a pleasant stay.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a balcony with mountain views, a washing machine, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional amenities include a dining table, sofa bed, and a TV.
Convenient Location: Located 19 km from Lovcen National Park, 33 km from Lake Skadar, and 37 km from Sveti Stefan. Tivat Airport is 38 km away. Nearby attractions include Kotor Clock Tower and Porto Montenegro Marina.
Highly Rated by Guests: Apartment Anita Cetinje receives high ratings for its comfortable accommodations and excellent facilities.
